char_negatives.kompis: no multiple dogs, no blurry retriever, keep Mingus golden retriever
char_negatives.vigolas: no weapon confusion, keep katana visible, no extra arms
char_negatives.smurjan: no face distortion, keep three-voice aesthetic, cosmic aura
char_negatives.trollmage: no missing hat, keep dark robes, no extra hands
char_negatives.rougeina: no missing jewelry, keep pink aesthetic, cosmic starlight

base_negative: blurry, low quality, distorted face, extra limbs, bad anatomy, watermark, text, signature, jpeg artifacts
